name: Freezer Mix Pasties
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Cook freezer mix in a large skillet until meat is brown. Drain off excess fat and remove from heat.
3. Stir in remaining ingredients except pie crust mix, then set aside.
4. Prepare pastry for Two-crust Pie according to package directions.
5. Divide dough into 8 equal portions. Roll each portion on a floured surface into a 7-inch circle.
6. On half of each circle, spread about 1/2 cup meat mixture (packed), stopping about 1/2 inch from the edge.
7. Moisten the edge of the pastry with water.
8. Fold the pastry over the filling and seal edges firmly with a fork. Place on an ungreased baking sheet; prick tops with a fork.
9. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes. Serve as sandwiches or place on plates and top with favorite gravy or sauce. NOTE: Substitute 1 cup of cooked vegetable for canned carrots if desired.
